items.title: DTM Lausitzring 1: Mapelli takes fortunate maiden win for Lamborghini Temerario GT3
items.summary: Abt-Lamborghini driver Marco Mapelli stormed to his first DTM victory at the Lausitzring on Saturday. The 38-year-old Italian, who had started the race from 16th on the grid, benefited from completing his mandatory pitstop during a full-course yellow phase. "Yes, at the start we took a gamble, just like others did, and I trusted the team," Mapelli told ProSieben. Despite a rain shower ... Keep reading

items.title: Marco Bezzecchi admits to 'difficult situation' after fourth sprint crash of 2026
items.summary: World championship leader Marco Bezzecchi has admitted that his Saturday mistakes are becoming a concern following his fourth sprint crash of the season at Brno.
